name: 28" Outdoor Tabletop Fireplace Black - Threshold™
description:
Keep cozy as you entertain or relax with this Outdoor Tabletop Fireplace from Threshold™. Crafted from heat-resistant steel for safety and durability, this black tabletop fireplace features a simple rectangular shape in a matte black finish to easily pair with any outdoor aesthetic. Complete with an adjustable flame and lava rocks, you can enjoy the ambiance of a classic fire without the mess of real wood and ashes. Place this adjustable flame tabletop fireplace on your patio dining table to create the perfect atmosphere for an evening with friends and family.

Threshold™: Quality & Design / Casual classics for house and home.
